originalTitle: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
title: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
content: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.

originalTitle: Nigeria drops terrorism financing charges against ex-justice minister
title: Nigeria drops terrorism financing charges against ex-justice minister
content: Abubakar Malami was seen as one of the most influential ministers under former President Muhammadu Buhari.

title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
content: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.

title: Blood, Sweat and Sugar
content: The sugar industry’s bitter legacy, built on slavery, exploitation and environmental damage, is still resonating today.

title: UN experts urge member states to suspend Israel arms transfers
content: The experts call Israel's bombardment of Lebanon on April 8 'a blatant violation of the UN Charter'.

title: Is Iran beating the US at its own propaganda game?
content: Iran has condemned a ban imposed by YouTube on a pro-Iranian group that releases Lego-style AI videos.

title: Slot says VAR has gone against Liverpool - is he right?

originalTitle: Are Kompany's Bayern a glimpse at football after Guardiola?
title: Vincent Kompany's Exciting New Football Adventure!
content:
Hello, hello, my wonderful friends across Africa! It’s your kid-friendly news reporter, bringing you exciting news from the world of football! Do you love football? I know you do! Kicking a ball with friends is so much fun. Today, we're going to talk about a very special man and a super famous football team. The man's name is Vincent Kompany, and the team is called Bayern Munich. Get ready for a story about new plans and big dreams on the football field!

Who is Vincent Kompany?

Vincent Kompany is a real football hero! He comes from a country far away called Belgium. For many, many years, he was an amazing football player. He was a strong defender, which means he was very good at stopping the other team from scoring goals. Think of him like a brave knight protecting his castle – his castle was his team's goal! Vincent Kompany played for a very big team called Manchester City. He was even their captain! A captain is like the leader of the players on the field. He helped them win many shiny trophies, which are like big cups you get for being the best! Now, Vincent Kompany is not playing anymore, but he is still in football. He has a new, very important job. Did you know? Vincent Kompany was so good that fans still talk about his amazing goals and strong tackles!

What Does a Football Manager Do?

Vincent Kompany's new job is a 'football manager.' What does a manager do, you ask? Well, it's a bit like being a teacher, a coach, and a team leader all rolled into one! The manager decides which players will play in the game. They choose who will start and who will come on later. They also teach the players special ways to play. These special ways are called 'tactics.' Tactics are like a secret plan to help the team win! For example, some tactics might be to pass the ball many times to confuse the other team. Other tactics might be to run very fast and score quickly. A good manager also makes sure all the players are happy, strong, and ready to play their best. It's a very big job, but it's super exciting because the manager helps the team play fantastic football! Did you know? Managers spend many hours thinking about the best ways for their team to play and win!

Kompany's Special Way to Play Football!

Vincent Kompany has a very fun and clever way he wants his team to play football. He loves it when his team has the ball most of the time. Why? Because if your team has the ball, the other team can't score against you! It's smart, right? He wants his players to pass the ball to each other a lot. Quick passes, smart passes! It's like a beautiful dance on the field, with the ball moving from one player to another. He also wants his players to be brave and always try to score goals. Goals are the best part of football! When you score a goal, everyone cheers loudly, and it feels wonderful. He also wants his team to be very strong when they don't have the ball. This means they run fast to get the ball back from the other team. They don't let the other team have too much space to play. It's like having many friends working together to protect something important. This special way of playing makes games very exciting to watch! Did you know? When a team passes the ball many times and keeps it, it's called 'possession-based football'!

Meet Bayern Munich!

Now, let's talk about the team Vincent Kompany is managing: Bayern Munich! This is a super, super famous team from a country called Germany. They are one of the best football teams in the whole wide world! They wear red shirts when they play, and they have won so many big trophies over the years. So, so many! Many children dream of playing for Bayern Munich one day. They play in a huge, amazing stadium where thousands of fans come to watch them. Now, with Vincent Kompany as their manager, they hope to win even more games and trophies. He will teach their players his special football secrets, and everyone is excited to see his fun football style on the field. Did you know? Bayern Munich has won the biggest club trophy in Europe, called the UEFA Champions League, many times!

Why Kompany's Football is Exciting!

Vincent Kompany's special way of playing football is like a brand-new adventure for Bayern Munich. It's fresh and full of energy! He wants his team to be fast, clever, and to surprise the other teams they play against. When they play his way, the games will be super exciting to watch. Imagine lots of passing, lots of running, and hopefully, lots of fantastic goals! Every manager has a different way of playing football, just like every person has a different favourite game. Kompany's way is all about teamwork, being brave, and enjoying the game. It makes football even more fun for the players and for us, the fans, who love to watch! Did you know? Good teamwork is like when all your friends work together to build the biggest, best sandcastle at the beach!

A Look into the Future of Football!

Many people around the world, like our friend Umir Irfan from BBC Sport, are watching Vincent Kompany very closely. They want to see how his special plan works with Bayern Munich. Will his ideas help them play even better and win more big games? Will other teams start to learn from his ideas and try to play like Kompany's team? It's like a new chapter opening in the big book of football. We will all learn new things from him. And who knows, maybe one day, you could be a great football player or even a fantastic manager like Vincent Kompany too! Always remember to play fair, have fun, and dream big! Thank you for listening to my news from Africa! Keep kicking that ball and chasing your dreams!
summary: Vincent Kompany, a former football star, is now the new manager for the famous Bayern Munich team and is bringing exciting new ways of playing football, focusing on lots of passing, being brave, and scoring many goals.
whyMatters: This matters because Vincent Kompany is bringing new, fun ideas to a big football team, and everyone is excited to see if his special way of playing will help them win even more games and make football even more thrilling to watch.
